    @allure.feature("Qube - –Я—А–Њ–µ–Ї—В Arisha")

    @pytest.mark.smoke
    @pytest.mark.regression
    @pytest.mark.ui
    @pytest.mark.flaky(reruns=2)
    @pytest.mark.parametrize("route_type", ["map", "agent", "client"])
    def test_arisha_apartment_information(arisha_page, route_type):
        """–Ґ–µ—Б—В –њ—А–Њ–≤–µ—А–Ї–Є –Є–љ—Д–Њ—А–Љ–∞—Ж–Є–Є –Њ–± –∞–њ–∞—А—В–∞–Љ–µ–љ—В–µ Arisha –љ–∞ –≤—Б–µ—Е —А–Њ—Г—В–∞—Е."""
    
        with allure.step(f"–Ю—В–Ї—А—Л–≤–∞–µ–Љ —Б—В—А–∞–љ–Є—Ж—Г {route_type} –Є –њ–µ—А–µ—Е–Њ–і–Є–Љ –Ї –њ—А–Њ–µ–Ї—В—Г Arisha"):
            arisha_page.open(route_type=route_type)
            arisha_page.map.navigate_to_project("arisha")
    
        with allure.step("–Ъ–ї–Є–Ї–∞–µ–Љ –љ–∞ –Ї–љ–Њ–њ–Ї—Г All units"):
            arisha_page.click_all_units_button()
            arisha_page.assertions.assert_url_contains(
                "catalog_2d", "–Э–µ –њ–µ—А–µ—И–ї–Є –љ–∞ —Б—В—А–∞–љ–Є—Ж—Г –Ї–∞—В–∞–ї–Њ–≥–∞"
            )
    
        with allure.step("–Ш—Й–µ–Љ –Є –Ї–ї–Є–Ї–∞–µ–Љ –љ–∞ –њ–µ—А–≤—Л–є –і–Њ—Б—В—Г–њ–љ—Л–є –∞–њ–∞—А—В–∞–Љ–µ–љ—В"):
            arisha_page.navigation.find_and_click_available_apartment()
    
        with allure.step("–Ю–ґ–Є–і–∞–µ–Љ –њ–Њ–ї–љ–Њ–є –Ј–∞–≥—А—Г–Ј–Ї–Є —Б—В—А–∞–љ–Є—Ж—Л –∞–њ–∞—А—В–∞–Љ–µ–љ—В–∞"):
            arisha_page.apartment_info.wait_for_info_to_appear()
            arisha_page.browser.wait_for_timeout(2000)
    
        with allure.step("–Я—А–Њ–≤–µ—А—П–µ–Љ –Є–љ—Д–Њ—А–Љ–∞—Ж–Є—О –Њ –Ј–і–∞–љ–Є–Є"):
